synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20932 Oracle Linux 9 bind bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20932
description:
[9.16.23-33.0.1]
- Fix warning when changing device file permissions [Orabug: 36518580]

[32:9.16.23-33]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20932

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20932.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
bind-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
bind-chroot-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
bind-devel-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
bind-devel-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
bind-dnssec-doc-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-dnssec-utils-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
bind-doc-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-libs-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.i686.rpm
bind-libs-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
bind-license-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-utils-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
python3-bind-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
bind-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
bind-chroot-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
bind-devel-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
bind-dnssec-doc-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-dnssec-utils-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
bind-doc-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-libs-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
bind-license-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm
bind-utils-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
python3-bind-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/bind-9.16.23-33.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[9.16.23-33.0.1]
- Fix warning when changing device file permissions [Orabug: 36518580]

[32:9.16.23-33]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)
